news.title:
PFC hits 52-week high, REC gains 5%; RBI proposes NBFC reforms.
Analyst sees upside for PFC, REC with key levels at ₹448 & ₹358.
news.summary:
PFC hits 52-week high, REC gains 5%; RBI proposes NBFC reforms.
Analyst sees upside for PFC, REC with key levels at ₹448 & ₹358.

news.title:
REC and PFC shares hit 52-week highs, signaling strong momentum.
Shares are set for their best monthly performance in years.
news.summary:
REC and PFC shares hit 52-week highs, signaling strong momentum.
Shares are set for their best monthly performance in years.

news.title:
Experts shared insights on Deepak Nitrite, Eternal, M&M, Bajaj Housing Finance, REC, and HUL on NDTV Profit.
Recommendations: Buy Eternal, M&M; hold Deepak Nitrite, HUL; avoid REC; buy Bajaj Housing Finance on dips.
news.summary:
Experts shared insights on Deepak Nitrite, Eternal, M&M, Bajaj Housing Finance, REC, and HUL on NDTV Profit.
Recommendations: Buy Eternal, M&M; hold Deepak Nitrite, HUL; avoid REC; buy Bajaj Housing Finance on dips.

news.title: REC appoints Rajesh Kumar as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO).
news.summary: REC appoints Rajesh Kumar as its new Chief Financial Officer (CFO).

news.title:
RBI's draft proposes asset size-based criteria for upper layer NBFCs, replacing parametric scoring.
Entities like IRFC, REC, and HUDCO may qualify under the new framework; stricter governance rules proposed.
news.summary:
RBI's draft proposes asset size-based criteria for upper layer NBFCs, replacing parametric scoring.
Entities like IRFC, REC, and HUDCO may qualify under the new framework; stricter governance rules proposed.

news.title: RBI regulations negatively impact REC, PFC, IRFC, and HUDCO.
news.summary: RBI regulations negatively impact REC, PFC, IRFC, and HUDCO.

news.title:
Govt may issue preference shares or fresh equity to retain 51% stake in PFC post REC merger.
FM announced PFC-REC restructuring in FY27 Budget to enhance scale and efficiency in public sector NBFCs.
news.summary:
Govt may issue preference shares or fresh equity to retain 51% stake in PFC post REC merger.
FM announced PFC-REC restructuring in FY27 Budget to enhance scale and efficiency in public sector NBFCs.

news.title:
Rajesh Kumar appointed Director (Finance) of REC Ltd, effective April 2, 2026.
He has 30+ years of experience, previously serving as REC's Executive Director (Finance).
news.summary:
Rajesh Kumar appointed Director (Finance) of REC Ltd, effective April 2, 2026.
He has 30+ years of experience, previously serving as REC's Executive Director (Finance).

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payments for NCDs GOI XIV, GOI X, GOI II, and GOI III for FY 25-26.
Interest payments totaling ₹124.9 Cr were made on 27 March 2026, as per SEBI regulations.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payments for NCDs GOI XIV, GOI X, GOI II, and GOI III for FY 25-26.
Interest payments totaling ₹124.9 Cr were made on 27 March 2026, as per SEBI regulations.

news.title:
REC board approves ₹1.6 lakh crore borrowing plan for FY27.
Plan includes ₹1.4 lakh crore via tax-exempt bonds, debentures, loans, and ECBs.
news.summary:
REC board approves ₹1.6 lakh crore borrowing plan for FY27.
Plan includes ₹1.4 lakh crore via tax-exempt bonds, debentures, loans, and ECBs.

news.title: REC Limited approves ₹1.6L Cr borrowing plan for FY27, includes bonds, ECBs, and short-term loans.
news.summary: REC Limited approves ₹1.6L Cr borrowing plan for FY27, includes bonds, ECBs, and short-term loans.

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms payment of interest on NCD Series GOI I for FY25-26.
Interest payment of ₹73.7 Cr was made timely on 23 March 2026 as scheduled.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms payment of interest on NCD Series GOI I for FY25-26.
Interest payment of ₹73.7 Cr was made timely on 23 March 2026 as scheduled.

news.title:
REC Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to discuss market borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.
The meeting aligns with SEBI's Listing and Disclosure Regulations, ensuring compliance.
news.summary:
REC Ltd's board to meet on March 25, 2026, to discuss market borrowing plans for FY 2026-27.
The meeting aligns with SEBI's Listing and Disclosure Regulations, ensuring compliance.

news.title:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.
news.summary:
REC, PFC, Castrol India, and India Glycols announce record dates for dividend payouts.
India Glycols offers Rs 7.50/share, Castrol Rs 5.25/share, PFC Rs 3.25/share, REC Rs 3.20/share dividends.

news.title:
REC Ltd fined ₹5.43L GST for non-compliance on board rules in Q4 2025.
Board seeks fine waiver; delays tied to Ministry of Power appointment process.
news.summary:
REC Ltd fined ₹5.43L GST for non-compliance on board rules in Q4 2025.
Board seeks fine waiver; delays tied to Ministry of Power appointment process.

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payment of ₹267.4 Cr on NCD Series 208 due 16 March 2026.
Interest record date was 2 March 2026, with last payment made on 15 March 2025.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest payment of ₹267.4 Cr on NCD Series 208 due 16 March 2026.
Interest record date was 2 March 2026, with last payment made on 15 March 2025.

news.title:
REC announces ₹3.20/share 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Record date is March 20, 2026; payments expected by April 14, 2026.
news.summary:

news.title: REC Limited to discuss 4th interim dividend on March 16.
news.summary: REC Limited to discuss 4th interim dividend on March 16.

news.title:
REC Ltd's board meeting on March 16, 2026, to consider 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.
Trading window for REC Ltd shares closed till March 18, 2026; reopens March 19, 2026.
news.summary:
REC Ltd's board meeting on March 16, 2026, to consider 4th interim dividend for FY 2025-26.

news.title:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest and redemption payments for NCDs Series 214A and 219 as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of ₹36.5 Cr and ₹238.6 Cr, and full redemption of ₹500 Cr and ₹3148.7 Cr, completed on 27-02-2026.
news.summary:
REC Ltd confirms timely interest and redemption payments for NCDs Series 214A and 219 as per SEBI regulations.
Interest payments of ₹36.5 Cr and ₹238.6 Cr, and full redemption of ₹500 Cr and ₹3148.7 Cr, completed on 27-02-2026.
